description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a large, rounded handle and a colorful, playful design wrapping around its exterior. The cup features a cartoon illustration of a smiling girl with braided hair, surrounded by red hearts and a pink polka-dot background. Prominently displayed on the cup is the phrase 'Feliz Dia das Mães' in bold red letters inside a large heart, celebrating Mother's Day in Portuguese. The artwork is vibrant and cheerful, making the cup suitable as a festive gift or decorative item. The interior of the cup is plain white, contrasting with the lively exterior. The overall shape is cylindrical with a slightly flared rim, typical of standard coffee mugs.
description: A white ceramic cup with a large handle, decorated with a cartoon girl, red hearts, and the phrase 'Feliz Dia das Mães' on a pink polka-dot background.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with the cartoon girl's face and part of the heart design visible, highlighting the playful artwork and some of the red hearts.
description_view_1: This view centers on the front, displaying the 'Feliz Dia das Mães' text inside a large heart, with the handle visible on the right.
description_view_2: The handle is most prominent in this view, with only the edges of the decorative pattern visible on either side.
description_view_3: The cup is shown with the heart and 'Feliz Dia das Mães' text in full view, and the handle on the left side.
